name: kartuli
description: Learn Georgian. No account needed. Free forever. Works offline.

scripts.prepare: if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then lefthook install; else echo 'Skipping lefthook install (not in git repo)'; fi
scripts.validate:all: pnpm run lint:root && pnpm run lint:all && pnpm run typecheck:all && pnpm run test:all
scripts.diagrams:game-client:dot: (cd apps/game-client && pnpm exec dependency-cruise --config ../../diagrams/config/dependency-cruiser.nextjs-app.js ./src/ --output-type dot) | dot -T svg > ./diagrams/output/current/diagram-game-client.svg
scripts.diagrams:game-client:mermaid: cd apps/game-client && pnpm exec dependency-cruise --config ../../diagrams/config/dependency-cruiser.nextjs-app.js ./src/ --output-type mermaid -f ../../diagrams/output/current/diagram-game-client.mmd
scripts.diagrams:game-client:web: (cd apps/game-client && pnpm exec dependency-cruise --config ../../diagrams/config/dependency-cruiser.nextjs-app.js ./src/ --output-type dot) | dot -T svg | node node_modules/dependency-cruiser/bin/wrap-stream-in-html.mjs > ./diagrams/output/current/diagram-game-client.html
scripts.diagrams:game-client: pnpm run diagrams:game-client:dot && pnpm run diagrams:game-client:mermaid && pnpm run diagrams:game-client:web
scripts.diagrams:backoffice-client:dot: (cd apps/backoffice-client && pnpm exec dependency-cruise --config ../../diagrams/config/dependency-cruiser.nextjs-app.js ./src/ --output-type dot) | dot -T svg > ./diagrams/output/current/diagram-backoffice-client.svg
scripts.diagrams:backoffice-client:mermaid: cd apps/backoffice-client && pnpm exec dependency-cruise --config ../../diagrams/config/dependency-cruiser.nextjs-app.js ./src/ --output-type mermaid -f ../../diagrams/output/current/diagram-backoffice-client.mmd
scripts.diagrams:backoffice-client:web: (cd apps/backoffice-client && pnpm exec dependency-cruise --config ../../diagrams/config/dependency-cruiser.nextjs-app.js ./src/ --output-type dot) | dot -T svg | node node_modules/dependency-cruiser/bin/wrap-stream-in-html.mjs > ./diagrams/output/current/diagram-backoffice-client.html
scripts.diagrams:backoffice-client: pnpm run diagrams:backoffice-client:dot && pnpm run diagrams:backoffice-client:mermaid && pnpm run diagrams:backoffice-client:web
scripts.diagrams:monorepo: pnpm run diagrams:monorepo:dot && pnpm run diagrams:monorepo:mermaid && pnpm run diagrams:monorepo:web
scripts.diagrams:all: pnpm run diagrams:game-client && pnpm run diagrams:backoffice-client && pnpm run diagrams:monorepo
scripts.c:e2e:game-client: BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 pnpm --filter @kartuli/e2e exec playwright test tests/game-client
scripts.c:e2e:backoffice-client: BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001 pnpm --filter @kartuli/e2e exec playwright test tests/backoffice-client
scripts.c:e2e:storybook: BASE_URL=http://localhost:6006 pnpm --filter @kartuli/e2e exec playwright test tests/storybook
scripts.c:e2e:web-docs-client: BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173 pnpm --filter @kartuli/e2e exec playwright test tests/web-docs-client
